meanings.definition: a cloud of fine particles suspended in a gas
a hot vapor containing fine particles of carbon being produced by combustion
examples: the fire produced a tower of black smoke that could be seen for miles

meanings.definition: an indication of some hidden activity
examples: with all that smoke there must be a fire somewhere
his dreams all turned to smoke
it was just smoke and mirrors

meanings.definition: tobacco leaves that have been made into a cylinder
the act of smoking tobacco or other substances
examples: he went outside for a smoke

meanings.definition: (baseball) a pitch thrown with maximum velocity
examples: he swung late on the fastball
he showed batters nothing but smoke

meanings.definition: inhale and exhale smoke from cigarettes, cigars, pipes
emit a cloud of fine particles
